subcodes.title: Words to newspaper reporters, spoken on 1912-09-29
subcodes.first_line: When I entered this city, I saw there was quite a stir. I asked the reason and was told that an agricultural convention was being held.
subcodes.first_line_orig: چون من وارد این شهر شدم دیدم همهمه است پرسیدم چه خبر است گفتند کنگرهٴ زراعت تشکیل میشود
